nodes.name: Philemon
nodes.summary: Philemon（Philemon）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联16种鸟类，如小吮蜜鳥、Meyer's friarbird、Timor friarbird等16种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Timor friarbird
nodes.summary: Timor friarbird（Philemon inornatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Timor friarbird。

nodes.name: Timor friarbird
nodes.summary: The Timor friarbird or plain friarbird (Philemon inornatus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found on Timor island. Habitat It is found on Timor island, where it plays an important cultural role. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry forests; it tends to be most present near roads, particularly flat low-traffic roads near rivers and mangroves. It is a species generalist. Threats It is threatened by human-caused habitat loss—caused by logging, forest fires, and illegitimate grazing—and poaching. Over the past decade, its population has decreased significantly. Diet It feeds primarily on nectar, and also eats insects and fruit. Social behavior Timor friarbirds live in pairs or small groups. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Timor friarbird or plain friarbird (Philemon inornatus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found on Timor island.

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。
